biography: Mikael, a name synonymous with precision and a calm demeanor on the golf course, hails from the esteemed Kurk Golf. Known for his meticulous approach to the game, Mikael brings a level of strategic thinking that often surprises his opponents. Although outwardly reserved, Mikael possesses a fierce competitive spirit that ignites when he steps onto the green.

Mikael has appeared at the Hector Trophée once, and while he may not have secured a victory, his presence is always noted for the quiet intensity he brings to the competition. Though considered retired from the Hector Trophée, the door is never truly closed, and fans hold a flicker of hope for a future appearance.
